# Perfection Painting Co.

> Perfection Painting is a premium residential and commercial painting company serving the North Shore of Massachusetts and Greater Boston. Founded by Wendell Nunes, whose 30 years of hands-on painting experience underpins every project, the company is fully licensed and insured and is known for meticulous preparation, premium paint brands, and an uncompromising standard of craftsmanship. The company name is also its standard: quality becomes perfection.

Perfection Painting was founded on a simple belief: every surface deserves to be treated with care, skill, and respect. Projects range from single-room interior refreshes to full exterior repaints, commercial storefronts, cabinet refinishing, plaster restoration, and weathered deck revival. Every job follows the same disciplined preparation process — wash, caulk, scrape, sand, prime — because cutting corners is never an option.

The company uses only premium paint brands including Benjamin Moore, California Paints, Farrow & Ball, and Fine Paints of Europe. Clients include homeowners across the North Shore and Boston, commercial property managers, real estate firms, and multi-unit condominium associations. Perfection Painting consistently earns 5-star reviews on Google and Angi.

## Company Overview

- [Homepage](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/): Full company overview, service list, portfolio, reviews, and estimate form.
- [Our Standard](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#standard): The disciplined preparation and craftsmanship process applied to every project.
- [Services](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#services): Complete list of painting and surface restoration services offered.
- [Portfolio](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#portfolio): Completed project gallery covering interior, exterior, progress, and before/after work.
- [Reviews](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#reviews): Client testimonials from homeowners and businesses across the North Shore and Boston.
- [About](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#about): Company background and founder story.
- [Get a Free Estimate](https://perfectionpaintingusa.com/#estimate): Request a free consultation and painting estimate.

## Services Offered

Perfection Painting offers the following services across residential and commercial projects:

1. **Interior Painting** — Walls, ceilings, trim, and detail work. Flawless, even finishes in any color with full property protection during the job.
2. **Exterior Painting** — Comprehensive prep, premium coatings, and weather-resistant finishes built for New England weather.
3. **Power Washing** — Restore driveways, siding, decks, and walkways to like-new condition by removing years of buildup.
4. **Staining and Wood Finishing** — Expert staining, sealing, and finishing to bring out the natural beauty of wood surfaces with lasting protection.
5. **Residential and Commercial Painting** — From cozy homes to office buildings and retail spaces, scaled expertise for projects large and small.
6. **Decks and Fences** — Painting, staining, and refinishing for decks, fences, and outdoor structures built to withstand New England weather.
7. **Water Damage Repair** — Expert restoration of water-damaged walls, ceilings, and surfaces. Repair, prime, and refinish to eliminate all traces of damage.
8. **Plaster Repair** — Seamless plaster patching, skim coating, and full restoration to bring damaged walls and ceilings back to a flawless smooth finish.
9. **Cabinet Refinishing** — Transform kitchens and bathrooms with professionally refinished cabinets at a fraction of the cost of replacement.

## The Perfection Standard

Every project at Perfection Painting follows the same disciplined preparation sequence:

- **Washing** — Remove all dirt, mold, and mildew so the finish coat adheres properly.
- **Caulking** — Seal out moisture by filling every gap, crack, corner, and butt joint.
- **Scraping** — Remove all visible loose and peeling paint to ensure a firm base.
- **Sanding** — Degloss surfaces where necessary to promote adhesion of the top coat.
- **Priming** — Seal the surface so the finish coat bites for the best possible adhesion.

Full cleanup is completed daily and at job completion. Ladders come down, tools are stacked, equipment is stored properly. Plants, shrubs, and landscaping are covered and protected throughout the project. Leftover paint is left on-site for future touch-ups.

Perfection Painting serves the North Shore of Massachusetts and Greater Boston, including:

- Boston
- Newburyport
- Gloucester
- Ipswich
- Rockport
- Beverly
- Salem
- Marblehead
- Danvers
- Hamilton
- Essex
- Manchester-by-the-Sea
- Topsfield
- Wenham
- And surrounding North Shore communities

## Premium Paint Brands Used

- **Benjamin Moore** — Industry-standard premium interior and exterior paints
- **California Paints** — High-performance coatings for demanding environments
- **Farrow & Ball** — Distinctive English paints known for depth of color
- **Fine Paints of Europe** — Premium Dutch paints for the highest-end finishes
